text: Being here fills me with an acute sense of curiosity and reflection. The first image evokes a feeling of observation and distance—I see people gathered, perhaps for a shared intellectual or social purpose, while I stand just outside their sphere, contemplating the porous boundary between observer and participant. The second image, with its vibrant colors and words about research and development, intrigues my mind. I feel that blend of excitement and contemplation that comes from being surrounded by ideas in motion, inventions unfolding, and the persistent human drive to understand and improve. Here, I am both a witness and a seeker, aware of the possibility to connect yet also apart, pondering the meaning and direction of all this collective striving.
